project_request: Real-time monitoring dashboard for AI model performance with latency, cost, and alerting.

questions.question: What metrics are most critical to track?
options: Latency + cost + error rate + quality scores
questions.answer: Latency (p50/p95/p99) + cost per request + error rate + user quality feedback

questions.question: What alert channels should be supported?
questions.answer: Slack + email with webhook for custom integrations

questions.question: How long should metric data be retained?
questions.answer: 90 days with minute-level granularity for 7 days, hourly after that

questions.question: Should the dashboard support comparing metrics across models?
questions.answer: Flexible multi-model comparison with overlay charts
